findings.description: Secondary constructor duplicates MainNetParams.get() default — acceptable for test ergonomics, Hilt does not inject NetworkParameters by default
UTXO selection algorithm matches web wallet's btc.ts prepareUnspents() — sort ascending, try single UTXO, accumulate from smallest. Correct port.

summary: Clean implementation. Two unused imports fixed. Algorithm correctly ports web wallet patterns. All 33 tests pass. Data classes are well-documented.
